song.title: Sanctified
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Church of God, beloved and chosen, Church of Christ for whom He died, Claim your gifts and praise the Giver, You are washed and sanctified.|| Sanctified by God the Father, And by Jesus Christ His Son, And by God the Holy Spirit, Holy, holy Three in One.
[V2] 2) By His will He sanctifieth, By the Spirit’s pow’r within; By the loving hand that chast’neth Fruits of righteousness to win;|| By His truth and by His promise, By the Word, His gift unpriced, By His own blood, and by union With the risen life of Christ.
[V3] 3) Holiness by faith in Jesus, Not by effort of your own, Sin’s dominion crushed and broken By the pow’r of grace alone,|| Christ, the holiness within you, His own beauty on your brow: This shall be your pilgrim brightness, This your blessed portion now.
[V4] 4) He will sanctify you wholly; Body, spirit, soul shall be Blameless till your Savior’s coming In His glorious majesty!|| He has perfected forever Those whom He has sanctified; Spotless, glorious, and holy, Is the Church, His chosen Bride.
song.author: Frances R. Havergal
